response.justification: Wei Chen is a seasoned generalist engineer (~15+ years) with strong TypeScript/Node depth, current MCP and agentic-tooling exposure at re:cinq, and a solid teaching/mentoring track record. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and the resume shows roughly one year of AI-adjacent work with no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, or Python — all core requirements. The profile fits a staff full-stack role far better than a GenAI forward-deployed engineer.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP and AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq
Deep full-stack engineering experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud (AWS CDK)
Proven mentoring and technical communication via workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: Falls far short of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of AI-adjacent work)
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience
Python absent from skills despite being a primary language for the role

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic workflow tooling exposure
Missing RAG/vector DB and Python skills
